instruction:
Match each of the trigonometric expressions below with the equivalent non-trigonometric function from the following list. Enter the appropriate letter (A,B,C,D, or E) in each blank.
A. $\tan(\arcsin(x/8))$ B. $\cos(\arcsin(x/8))$ C. $(1/2)\sin(2\arcsin(x/8))$ D. $\sin(\arctan(x/8))$ E. $\cos(\arctan(x/8))$ [ANS] 1. $ \frac{x}{64}\sqrt{64-x^2}$ [ANS] 2. $ \frac{x}{\sqrt{64+x^2}}$ [ANS] 3. $ \frac{8}{\sqrt{64+x^2}}$ [ANS] 4. $ \frac{x}{\sqrt{64-x^2}}$ [ANS] 5. $ \frac{\sqrt{64-x^2}}{8}$
